backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing BonsaiNFT with access control, user profiles, address book management, blob storage integration, and NFT operations (mint, burn, transfer, redeem) with ORIGYN-compliant metadata and provenance tracking.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features for replacing forge ambient sounds with deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill background music in the AmbientSound component.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and styling with forge-themed aesthetics, NFT management, 3D trophy room, and audio integration.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Video.gif as favicon and social media preview image, includes meta tags for branding and mobile optimization.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component managing authentication state, view routing (home/admin/user/trophy), profile setup modal display logic, and theme provider with forge background.
frontend/src/components/AddressBookModal: Modal dialog for managing address book entries with CRUD operations (add, update, delete), Principal ID validation, clipboard copy functionality, and entry selection for transfers/airdrops.
frontend/src/components/AmbientSound.tsx: Web Audio API component generating deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill background music with synthesized bass layer (40-60Hz), atmospheric detuned sawtooth pads, and rhythmic pulse elements controlled by volume toggle.
frontend/src/components/FireBackground.t: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying 'Powered by T3kNo-Logic RWA Technology' with animated flame icon.
Animated canvas component that renders a forge-themed background with particle effects (sparks and embers) and molten metal flows, with configurable intensity levels.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main navigation header component with authentication controls, theme toggle, ambient sound, and navigation buttons for home, admin, user, and trophy views.
frontend/src/components/ProfileEditModal: Modal dialog for editing user profile including display name, bio, forge theme selection, and profile image upload with validation and preview.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Initial profile setup modal that prompts new users to enter a display name, cannot be dismissed until completed.
frontend/src/components/SVGBonsaiLayer.t: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/SVGForgeLayer.ts: SVG-based decorative layer component that renders forge-themed visual effects (glows, molten streams, anvil silhouette) with hero and subtle variants.
frontend/src/components/TransparencyDash: Modal dashboard displaying transaction history (mint, burn, transfer) for NFTs, with separate tabs for user transactions and admin view of all transactions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, with automatic query invalidation when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend operations including user profiles, NFT management, redemptions, transactions, and address book, with media asset caching and rehydration utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with a forge-themed design system including light/dark mode color variables, custom animations (flicker, ember-float, gold-pulse, shimmer-wave), and typography settings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for NFT management (minting, batch minting, transfers), leaderboard visibility toggle, transaction history, and file upload functionality with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with video background, hero section showcasing Bonsai NFT collection, and features overview with navigation to authenticated user views or login prompt.
frontend/src/pages/TrophyRoom.tsx: 3D trophy room component using Three.js to display owned NFTs and redemption history with interactive meshes, particle effects, orbit controls, raycasting for hover/selection, and Web Audio API for metallic clink and ember pop sound effects.
frontend/src/pages/UserDashboard.tsx: User dashboard page displaying NFT collection, redemption history, leaderboard, and user profile with tabs for navigation; includes modals for profile editing, address book, transparency dashboard, and NFT redemption/burning functionality.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme for sidebar/chart/card components, custom animations for accordions, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for an NFT minting application with existing features for cyberpunk Psy chill background music and pending feature requests for provenance display and wallet transfer functionality.
